title: arneomai #0720
definition:
1) to deny
 2) to deny someone
   2a) to deny one's self
       2a1) to disregard his own interests or to prove false to himself
       2a2) act entirely unlike himself
 3) to deny, abnegate, abjure
 4) not to accept, to reject, to refuse something offered

    NASB:  to deny, say no:
